purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for Gu Huaizhang's project-level multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Use the current Zhaoming sun-moon emblem only as locked continuity reference; any Zhaoming visual language on Gu Huaizhang must remain partial, inherited, worn, and physically embedded in broken route-line embroidery, thread fragments, red knots, damp stains, torn fabric edges, and non-symbolic old-court hardware. No new personal crest, no clean public chest badge, and no complete circular sun-moon, medallion, astrolabe, compass, halo, or badge-like geometry.
must_have: Gu Huaizhang must read as an older southern teacher and Fuyizhe political pressure figure
three states must preserve one continuous identity
southern red-line scrolls and damp-proof scroll tools must stay readable
old-imperial costume must be complete, expensive, humid-climate adapted, and historically burdened
Zhaoming badge continuity must not be redesigned
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: redesigned Zhaoming badge, new personal crest, clean public chest emblem, ordinary golden sun icon, modern logo, complete circular sun-moon motif, medallion, astrolabe, compass, halo, circular badge-like geometry, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, emperor, king, immortal sage, wizard, monk, priest, sorcerer, court eunuch caricature, generic villain, high magic aura, spell circle, glowing staff, floating scrolls, halo, angel wings, beggar rags, shredded robes, muddy refugee clothing, gore, horror age makeup, oversaturated palace-drama luxury, clean gold palace, flawless righteous empire mood, modern professor, modern politician, modern briefcase, glasses, tie, suit, youthful scholar drift, cyberpunk, sci-fi

input_images.role: global mood and low-magic eastern epic texture reference
Southern old empire color and humid archive material reference
locked Zhaoming emblem reference; do not redesign or replace
locked old empire symbol system reference for partial inherited embroidery, seal fragments, and worn pressure marks
Yan Nanzhi continuity reference; Gu Huaizhang should visually explain her old-imperial pressure without copying her silhouette

prompts.image_prompt: Create one extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for Gu Huaizhang from the series Severed Homeland. Gu Huaizhang is Yan Nanzhi's southern teacher, an older Zhaoming remnant official-scholar, and a Fuyizhe representative who pressures her to become the Sun-Moon banner. He is approximately 60 to 68, slim and upright, with a refined severe older face, attentive eyes, silver-streaked black hair in a restrained topknot or tied-back scholar style, neat beard or moustache, long instructional hands, and ceremonial posture. He is not a ruler, not a wizard, not an immortal sage, not a monk, and not a generic villain. Use low-magic eastern epic realism with tactile old cloth, thin gauze, damp southern archive materials, cracked red lacquer, old white stone, worn gold, royal blue cloth, vermilion old lacquer, moon-white underlayers, vine green plant dye, red cords, oil paper, and restrained cinematic lighting. The board shows the same older man in three full-body standing states across the top: 1) southern edict state, light vermilion silk-gauze outer robe, royal-blue thin-brocade inner layer, moon-white underlayer, worn-gold trim, short breathable over-jacket adapted to humid southern climate, southern red-line scroll bag and red cord knots, controlled teaching posture; 2) old-imperial ritual teaching state, more complete formal Ming-inspired Hanfu structure with wide sleeves, vermilion and blue hierarchy, moon-white underlayer, thin gold-woven cloud and star-route patterns, old-court pendant hardware, strict vertical posture as if pressing doctrine onto Yan Nanzhi in memory; 3) secret-letter travel state, the same old-court teacher compressed into practical covert travel, gathered sleeves, darker damp-proof short overcoat, oil-paper scroll wrap, red-line wooden scroll cylinder, dark-brown lacquer case, subdued vermilion inner edge and royal-blue cord, still noble and disciplined, not an assassin or martial hero. Include detail panels below: older severe refined face and silver-streaked hair, restrained topknot and neat beard, long teaching hands pressing a scroll or sealed order, red-line scroll bag and red cord knots, oil-paper scroll tube and lacquer case, lightweight gauze and breathable wide sleeve construction, worn-gold trim with partial old sun-moon and star-route embroidery, old white stone, cracked vermilion lacquer, dark archive table, humidity stains, and a tiny worn partial Zhaoming pressure mark on a scroll seal or pendant. Include a material swatch strip with old white stone, vermilion old lacquer, royal blue cloth, moon-white underlayer, vine green plant dye, worn gold thread, damp dark-brown lacquer, and southern red cord. Important badge rule: do not redesign any faction badge. Use the existing Zhaoming sun-moon emblem only as locked continuity reference. Do not place a clean public chest badge, large new sun emblem, banner logo, or new personal crest anywhere. Zhaoming language may appear only as partial inherited embroidery, worn seal pressure, tiny pendant detail, or damaged screen fragment. No visible labels, no readable text, no Chinese characters, no Latin letters, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: redesigned Zhaoming badge, new Gu Huaizhang crest, clean public chest emblem, oversized sun badge, ordinary golden sun icon, modern logo, complete circular sun-moon motif, medallion, astrolabe, compass, halo, circular badge-like geometry, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, emperor, king, immortal sage, wizard, monk, priest, sorcerer, court eunuch caricature, generic villain, fantasy assassin, martial hero, high magic aura, spell circle, glowing staff, floating scrolls, halo, angel wings, beggar rags, shredded robes, muddy refugee clothing, gore, horror age makeup, oversaturated palace-drama luxury, clean gold palace, flawless righteous empire mood, modern professor, modern politician, modern briefcase, glasses, tie, suit, youthful scholar drift, cyberpunk, sci-fi
